title: Spreadsheets, Python, Reproducibility, and Calculation Checks · Spiral Review
summary: Turn a hand calculation into a reusable, tested worksheet and small Python model. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a reproducible calculation tool with test cases after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use relative and absolute cell references intentionally in copied formulas.
Add input constraints, units, labels, and audit cells to a spreadsheet model.
Express a unit-aware calculation as readable Python variables, functions, and output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

stimulus.title: Reproducible Report case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: math beginner computational tools. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Publish inputs, method, version, results, limitations, and rerun instructions. Artifact under review: a reproducible calculation tool with test cases.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Reproducible Report, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Reproducible Report applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Publish inputs, method, version, results, limitations, and rerun instructions.
